fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the standard task code.
The program automatically retrieves the standard task code from the Code field in the Standard Task table.
The program uses the standard task code to link the standard task description with the standard task.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Shows the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different standard task description lines.

fields.name: Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the text for the standard task description.
